ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Elliott Bay Trail in Myrtle Edwards Park) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of pedestrians and bikes */,
  "ped_north" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians traveling north */,
  "ped_south" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians traveling south */,
  "bike_north" INTEGER /* Number of bikes traveling north */,
  "bike_south" INTEGER /* Number of bikes traveling south */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of data collection */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (Monday to Sunday) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (morning, afternoon, evening, night) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the alert was generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the alert message */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., traffic congestion, accident, road closure) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system performance entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the performance data was collected */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., data quality, response time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the performance metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the performance metric (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, radar, inductive loop) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera feed */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the camera that captured the feed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the feed was captured */,
  "feed_url" TEXT /* URL of the camera feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the feed (e.g., video, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_feeds_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor or camera that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., software update, hardware replacement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
